title: donax × acutiflorus
intro: Donax × acutiflorus, also known as the yellow horned poppy or yellow horned acacia, is a hybrid plant species in the legume family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Donax × acutiflorus include its ability to treat fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Donax × acutiflorus can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
